# PostgresBackupJobComponent

Run pg_dump → upload to S3/GCS/local — backup as a job, no asset materialized.

## Dependencies
- `boto3`

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `job_name` | `str` | Dagster job name |
| `pg_host` | `str` | Postgres host |
| `pg_database` | `str` | Database name |
| `output` | `str` | Destination: 'local:/path/to/file.dump' or 's3://bucket/key' (timestamp inserted before extension) |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tags` | `dict` | — | Dagster job tags |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | STOPPED \| RUNNING |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `schedule` | `str` | — | Cron schedule (None = no schedule) |
| `pg_port` | `int` | `5432` | — |
| `pg_user_env` | `str` | `"PG_USER"` | — |
| `pg_password_env` | `str` | `"PG_PASSWORD"` | — |
| `pg_dump_bin` | `str` | `"pg_dump"` | — |
| `aws_profile` | `str` | — | — |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## What this is
A **Dagster job** (no asset materialized) — the component installs a `dg.job`
plus an optional schedule. Lineage graph stays clean; the work happens
behind the scenes.
